name: Chocolate Meringue Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Beat together the egg whites, vanilla, and salt until frothy using an electric mixer.
3. Slowly beat in the sugar, about 1 tablespoon at a time, on medium speed.
4. Continue beating the meringue until the sugar dissolves and the whites become glossy and form soft peaks.
5. Gently fold in the chocolate chips and chopped walnuts.
6. Drop by teaspoonfuls onto a well-greased cookie sheet.
7. Place the cookies in the preheated oven and close the door.
8. Turn off the oven and let it cool completely without opening the door for 4-5 hours (or overnight).
9. Serve when cooled.
(Note: This recipe makes approximately 12-18-20 cookies, depending on size.)
